name: Dennis Russell Davies
abstract: Dennis Russell Davies (born April 16, 1944) is an American conductor and pianist. He is chief conductor of the Brno Philharmonic and of the MDR Leipzig Radio Symphony Orchestra.

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: one of the cello concertos for Janos Starker which was premiered by Russell Dennis Davies [Dennis Russell Davies] at the – was it in Minneapolis? Yes, in Minneapolis, with the St. Paul Chamber Orchestra.

about_quotes.evidence: it was played by The American Composers Orchestra... conducted by Dennis Russell Davies, and it was my first piece for full symphony orchestra
